title: Bump Builder image ComfyUI v0.25.1 -> v0.27.0 (parity with app+Pod)
description: DEFERRED - pick up only when the Builder is next used (user decides). Follow-up to MPI-148 (app+Pod bumped to v0.27.0). The Builder authoring image is still on the OLD core COMFYUI_REF=eca4757 (tag v0.25.1) - two minors behind. Bump mpi-ci/cubric-vision-builder/Dockerfile COMFYUI_REF eca4757d653654deb5744edf16a862f352800fdc -> bb131be9e83d2f773c90f1d6f1e4b248a498c8c5 (v0.27.0, VERIFIED) so workflows authored on the Builder match app/Pod core. Then: rebuild the Builder image (cu130, LOCAL-only - overflows CI; use the build-pod-image skill Flow B), re-run install_nodes.sh on a fresh Pod, confirm node set + LTX-2.3 workflow load on 0.27. Keep kornia 0.8.2 pin. After rebuild bump the RunPod template (id 2brluktxb4) image tag + update 'Current shipped tag' in the builder README. Edit mpi-ci with git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci (separate repo). BRANCH: mpi-ci only.
